title: 未来とつながるマジカルメロディ 5話 with.初音ミク

script.text: ミク

translations.en: Miku

script.text: 私達と、曲をつくりましょう

translations.en: Let's create the song together.

script.text: 曲を創る……

translations.en: Creating the song together…

script.text: トリエルのみんなと、私で？

translations.en: With everyone from TRINITYAiLE?

script.text: そう。マジカルミライの10周年を祝うイベントで

translations.en: Yes. At the event celebrating Magical Mirai's 10th anniversary.

script.text: 改めてミク自身の想いを、歌に込めて歌うの

translations.en: We will sing and express Miku's own feelings through the song.

script.text: 誰かの想いを届ける歌じゃない

translations.en: It's not a song to deliver someone else's feelings.

script.text: ミク自身の、素直な想いを

translations.en: It's Miku's sincere feelings.

script.text: 私自身の、想いを……

translations.en: My own feelings…

script.text: そんな驚くことじゃないでしょう？

translations.en: It's not really surprising‚ is it?

script.text: 私達はアイドルで、あなたはバーチャル・シンガー

translations.en: We are idols‚ and you are a virtual singer.

script.text: 体の有無や技術なんて関係ない

translations.en: It doesn't matter if we have bodies or skills.

script.text: 私達には歌があるんだから

translations.en: We have our songs.

script.text: ……うん、そうだったね

translations.en: …Yeah‚ that's right.

script.text: 私、ファンのみんなと、もっともっと寄り添いたい

translations.en: I want to be closer to my fans.

script.text: 他の誰でもない、私自身の想いが届くように……

translations.en: To deliver my own feelings…

script.text: 私の想いで形作られた歌を、歌いたい……！

translations.en: I want to sing the songs that are shaped by my own feelings!

script.text: ミクの想い、受け取ったよ。そしたら……

translations.en: I've received Miku's feelings. So…

script.text: 今度のマジカルミライ、今のままじゃダメよね

translations.en: The upcoming Magical Mirai cannot stay the same.

script.text: せやね。ミクちゃんの素直な想いを反映させんと

translations.en: Yeah‚ we have to reflect Miku-chan's sincere feelings.

script.text: 歌詞は一から練り直し……ううん

translations.en: We need to rework the lyrics from scratch… No.

script.text: コンセプトから曲づくり、やり直さなあかんね

translations.en: We have to redo the entire song‚ starting from the concept.

script.text: い、今からつくり直し！？

translations.en: R-Right now‚ redo it!?

script.text: しかもコンセプトからって、そんな無茶な……

translations.en: And starting from the concept‚ that's too much…

script.text: でも、私達が『記念日をお祝いする歌』

translations.en: But‚ a song to celebrate the anniversary…

script.text: じゃダメなんです

translations.en: Won't work.

script.text: 『ミクちゃんも一緒にお祝いする歌』にしなくちゃ！

translations.en: We have to make it a "song to celebrate with Miku-chan"!

script.text: だから、その無茶を承知で……

translations.en: That's why‚ knowing it's challenging…

script.text: お願いします、{user}さん！

translations.en: Please‚ {user}-san!

script.text: ……まぁ、今回は歌詞合わせでの作曲だったから

translations.en: …Well‚ since this time it's composing while adjusting the lyrics‚

script.text: 幸い曲づくりはまだだけど……発注、間に合うかな？

translations.en: fortunately‚ we still have time for the composition… But can we make the order in time?

script.text: いえ……作曲なら、私に任せて下さい！

translations.en: No… If it's composing‚ leave it to me!

script.text: ミク……？

translations.en: Miku…?

script.text: ――数日後

translations.en: ――Few days later

script.text: これが、新しくつくり直した歌詞よ

translations.en: This is the newly rewritten lyrics.

script.text: あと一応、私達で考えたメインメロディーの音源も

translations.en: Also‚ we have the audio source of the main melody that we discussed.

script.text: でも、これだけで本当に曲が出来るの？

translations.en: But can we really create a complete song with just this?

script.text: 大丈夫。任せて

translations.en: It's okay. Leave it to me.

script.text: ……それじゃあ、始めるね

translations.en: …Alright then‚ let's begin.

script.text: ……あ、本当だ。音が自然に生まれて……

translations.en: …Ah‚ that's right. The sound is naturally coming together…

script.text: 少しずつ、メロディーに重なってく

translations.en: Gradually blending into the melody.

script.text: ミクが詞を読み上げるたびに

translations.en: Every time Miku reads the lyrics‚

script.text: 曲に……歌になっていくのね

translations.en: They turn into music… into a song.

script.text: 凄いなぁ……ミクちゃん、こんなことまで出来るなんて

translations.en: Amazing… Miku-chan‚ you can do all of this.

script.text: バーチャル・シンガーだからこその……

translations.en: It's because you're a virtual singer…

script.text: ……歌詞に込められた、いろんな想い

translations.en: …Various feelings are embedded in the lyrics.

script.text: それを繋げていけば、曲は線になって自然と導き出せる

translations.en: If we connect them‚ the song will naturally take shape like a line.

script.text: 瑠依ちゃんと、優ちゃん、すみれちゃん……

translations.en: Rui-chan‚ Yu-chan‚ Sumire-chan…

script.text: そして、私の『想い』という点が、全て繋がった

translations.en: And my "feelings" have connected everything.

script.text: ミク……もしかして、泣いてる？

translations.en: Miku… Are you crying‚ by any chance?

script.text: ふふっ……とても、温かい詞だったからかな

translations.en: Hehe… Maybe it's because the lyrics are very warm.

script.text: バーチャルな存在なのにね、変なの

translations.en: It's strange‚ even though I'm a virtual existence.

script.text: ……全然変じゃないわ

translations.en: …It's not strange at all.

script.text: あなたに私達の気持ちが届いたって証拠だもの

translations.en: It's proof that our feelings have reached you.

script.text: ともかく！　これで詞も曲も出来上がったね

translations.en: Anyway! With this‚ both the lyrics and the song are complete.

script.text: 後は私達四人で、ひたすらレッスンだ！

translations.en: Now it's just the four of us‚ intense practice!

script.text: 無茶したせいで、本番まで時間もないし

translations.en: Due to our recklessness‚ there's not much time until the performance.

script.text: 頑張っていこな！

translations.en: Let's do our best!

script.text: うん！　最高の一曲に仕上げよう

translations.en: Yeah! Let's make it an amazing song.

script.text: 私達、四人で！

translations.en: The four of us!

script.text: ええ！

translations.en: Yes!

script.text: ――マジカルミライ10th Anniversary

translations.en: ――Magical Mirai 10th Anniversary

script.text: in VENUS STAGE当日

translations.en: in VENUS STAGE‚ D-day

script.text: ふぅ……いよいよね

translations.en: Phew… It's finally here.

script.text: みんな、準備はいい？

translations.en: Is everyone ready?

script.text: もちろん！

translations.en: Of course!

script.text: ……もしかして瑠依ちゃん、緊張してる？

translations.en: … Rui-chan‚ are you nervous?

script.text: 少しだけね……今回は、特別なライブだから

translations.en: Just a little… Because this time‚ it's a special live.

script.text: 瑠依ちゃんにしてはめずらしいなぁ

translations.en: It's unusual for Rui-chan‚ isn't it?

script.text: むしろうちは楽しみ過ぎて震えとるわ～

translations.en: Well‚ I'm shaking with excitement~

script.text: そうだね！　なんてったって今日は……

translations.en: That's right! After all…

script.text: ミクちゃんとの共演ライブだもん！

translations.en: It's a joint live with Miku-chan!

script.text: うん！　私も今、凄くワクワクしてるよ

translations.en: Yeah! I'm really excited right now.

script.text: トリエルとの共演、ずっと心待ちにしていたから

translations.en: I've been looking forward to this joint live.

script.text: はぁ……分身の術が使えたらなぁ

translations.en: Sigh… If only I could use the Clone Jutsu.

script.text: もう一人のうちは客席から観られたのに

translations.en: The other me could have watched from the audience.

script.text: 何言ってるの、まったく

translations.en: What are you talking about‚ really.

script.text: でも……みんなと話して、少し緊張もほぐれたわ

translations.en: But… after talking with everyone‚ I feel a little less nervous.

script.text: ありのままに、想いのままに……

translations.en: Being true to ourselves‚ expressing our feelings…

script.text: 今日のライブを、四人で楽しもう

translations.en: Let's enjoy today's live together‚ the four of us.

script.text: うん！　……あ、でも

translations.en: Yeah! …Oh‚ but…

script.text: 今のうちに、みんなへ伝えておきたいことがあるの

translations.en: Before we start‚ there's something I want to tell everyone.

script.text: みんなに出会えて、本当に良かった

translations.en: I'm really glad to have met all of you.

script.text: 私自身の『想い』を歌にして、届ける……

translations.en: To sing my own "feelings" and deliver them…

script.text: そんな素敵な機会に巡り会えたから

translations.en: I had the opportunity for such a wonderful encounter.

script.text: だから、ありがとう！

translations.en: So‚ thank you!

script.text: それは私達も同じだよ！

translations.en: We feel the same way!

script.text: 自分達で作詞するって挑戦も出来たし

translations.en: We were able to challenge ourselves by writing lyrics on our own.

script.text: ミクちゃんの考え方とかに触れられて

translations.en: And we learned a lot from Miku-chan's way of thinking.

script.text: いろいろ勉強なったしなぁ

translations.en: It was a valuable experience.

script.text: そして……かけがえのない友達が出来たこと

translations.en: And… we gained a irreplaceable friend.

script.text: それが何よりも、嬉しいわ

translations.en: That's what makes me the happiest.

script.text: 友達……ふふっ！　私もだよ！

translations.en: Friend… Hehe! I feel the same way!

script.text: それじゃあ、いくわよ……

translations.en: Then‚ let's go…

script.text: 私達の歌で、胸躍らせよう

translations.en: Let our songs make people's hearts leap.

script.text: 白い翼で

translations.en: With our white wings.

script.text: 世界を翔て

translations.en: Soaring through the world.

script.text: 想いを届ける

translations.en: Delivering our feelings.

script.text: TRINITYAiLE！　with.初音ミク！

translations.en: TRINITYAiLE! with. Hatsune Miku!

script.text: みんな！　今日は集まってくれてありがとう！

translations.en: Everyone! Thank you for coming here today!

script.text: 曲の前に……少しだけ、いいかな？

translations.en: Before we start the song… Can I say something?

script.text: 私はこれまで、いろんな人達のいろんな想いを

translations.en: Up until now‚ I've connected various people's feelings

script.text: 歌という形で繋いできた……

translations.en: Through the form of singing…

script.text: でも今から歌う曲は、TRINITYAiLEの

translations.en: But the song we're about to sing now is a song

script.text: みんなと創った、私自身の『想い』も沢山込めた曲なの

translations.en: That I created together with TRINITYAiLE

script.text: もしかしたら、いつもの初音ミクっぽくないって

translations.en: It's a song that contains a lot of my own "feelings"

script.text: 思う人もいるかもしれない……でも！

translations.en: Maybe some people might think it's not the usual Hatsune Miku-like song…

script.text: 今日、どうしてもみんなに伝えたい想いがあるから！

translations.en: But! There's something I really want to convey to everyone today!

script.text: 聴いてくれるかな？　届けても、いいかな！？

translations.en: Will you listen? Can I deliver it?

script.text: ……っ！　ありがとう、みんな！

translations.en: …! Thank you‚ everyone!

script.text: さあ、いくわよミク

translations.en: Alright‚ let's go‚ Miku.

script.text: 歌おう……そして、届けよう！

translations.en: Let's sing… and deliver it!

script.text: 私達の、ありったけの『想い』を！

translations.en: Our wholehearted "feelings"!
